testcase.name: test_update_config_invalid_steps_low

failure.message: AssertionError: Invalid steps_per_km accepted assert 1000 >= 1100 + where 1000 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcc0920efe40>('steps_per_km', 1300) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcc0920efe40> = {'key': 'main', 'logo_url': '', 'name': 'The Kenya Challenge', 'primary_color': '#ea580c', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_batch_features.py:123: in test_update_config_invalid_steps_low assert data.get("steps_per_km", 1300) >= 1100, "Invalid steps_per_km accepted" E AssertionError: Invalid steps_per_km accepted E assert 1000 >= 1100 E + where 1000 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcc0920efe40>('steps_per_km', 1300) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcc0920efe40> = {'key': 'main', 'logo_url': '', 'name': 'The Kenya Challenge', 'primary_color': '#ea580c', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_update_config_invalid_steps_high

failure.message: AssertionError: Invalid steps_per_km accepted assert 2000 <= 1600 + where 2000 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcc091e51640>('steps_per_km', 1300) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcc091e51640> = {'key': 'main', 'logo_url': '', 'name': 'The Kenya Challenge', 'primary_color': '#ea580c', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_batch_features.py:138: in test_update_config_invalid_steps_high assert data.get("steps_per_km", 1300) <= 1600, "Invalid steps_per_km accepted" E AssertionError: Invalid steps_per_km accepted E assert 2000 <= 1600 E + where 2000 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcc091e51640>('steps_per_km', 1300) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcc091e51640> = {'key': 'main', 'logo_url': '', 'name': 'The Kenya Challenge', 'primary_color': '#ea580c', ...}.get
